content.en:
The Forbidden Mother Stone is rooted in the veins of the Forbidden Dao Stone, which is more difficult to dig than the Forbidden Dao Stone, and the Dao Ancestors blocked each other, so they could not be successfully stripped out.

Otherwise, no matter how fast the Void Dao Ancestor was, he would not be able to compete for the Forbidden Mother Stone.

At this time, the Void Mi Dao Ancestor had already arrived, and those Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors had lost their chance, and it was simply too difficult to compete with the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian was also targeted by the Void Mi Dao Ancestor, and the other party directly attacked him with a Dao technique.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian's expression changed, and the Great Wilderness Law Body was urged to the extreme, and the forbidden body of the Xiaocheng Realm was also urged to the extreme.

However, this technique of the Void Mi Dao Ancestor is the strongest Dao Technique - Killing the Void Mi Sword!

The Supreme Dao Technique is the ultimate Dao Technique, even if the Void Mi Dao Ancestor's Killing Void Mi Sword is only the entry realm, but the Extreme Dao Technique of the entry realm is also extremely terrifying, far surpassing other Dao techniques.

Rumble!!!

Layers of defense were pierced, and even the defense of the battle robe at the level of the Heavenly General was shattered like paper paste, the Great Wilderness Law Body was also broken, and the forbidden body of the Xiaocheng realm only weakened about one percent of the attack.

In an instant, one of Ye Tian's life-saving things was consumed.

But even so, Ye Tian was also injured, and the injury was not light.

But in the next moment, he used the power of his origin to quickly consume the injury.

If others dared to do this, it would be useless, but Ye Tiannai was a supreme true ancestor, and the things of the origin were endless, so he was not afraid of consumption at all.

Seeing that his attack had failed to kill a True Ancestor, the Void Mi Dao Ancestor immediately frowned.

Although he had heard of the name of the Nine Extremes General, he didn't know that Ye Tian had reached the Supreme True Ancestor realm, and he just felt that a True Ancestor would dare to snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone, so he wanted to kill and deal with it, which could be regarded as getting rid of a future opponent for the Mitian Sect.

But now that he knows that he is the Supreme True Ancestor, he knows that he can't kill the other party in a short time.

After all, being able to recover from injuries with the power of the origin is very difficult to kill.

If it was usual, he would definitely do his best to kill Ye Tian, but now that the Forbidden Mother Stone was born, he would definitely do his best to fight for the Forbidden Mother Stone.

No matter how important Ye Tian is, it is not as important as the taboo mother stone.

Immediately, he gave up on Ye Tian and went deep into the depths of the forbidden Dao stone vein with one hand, wanting to take away the forbidden mother stone.

And at this time, other Supreme Dao Ancestors also arrived.

I saw that a wind knife appeared in front of the Void Mi Dao Ancestor, which looked very ordinary, but the Void Mi Dao Ancestor's expression changed, his body quickly retreated, and layers of Dao art defenses were opened.

Puff puff!!!

The layers of defense were broken through by the wind knife, and finally left a wound on the body of the Void Mi Dao Ancestor.

"Wind King, you're here too!"

The Void Dao Ancestor's gaze looked somewhere in the void.

I saw the Wind King come out of nothingness, followed by the Fire King.

The two of them are dressed very similarly, except that one of the robes is engraved with the forbidden word - wind, and the other is engraved with the forbidden word - fire!

"Black Wind Mountain, Wind King, Fire King, didn't the other kings come?"

Xumi Dao Ancestor said coldly.

What he said was deliberate, which force would send all the Supreme Dao Ancestors out?

Moreover, many Supreme Dao Ancestors have not recovered from their injuries now, and if they force them out, it will be easy to fall, so naturally they will not take risks for the sake of the forbidden mother stone.

Besides, when the forbidden mother stone is not large, if a force is fought for by multiple supreme Dao ancestors, how should it be divided? Could it be that the supreme Dao ancestors of one force still have to fight each other?

Therefore, the supreme Dao Ancestor of a force will also discuss who will go out.

It is already remarkable that the six kings of Black Wind Mountain can come to two, and most of the Eight Heavenly forces can also have two supreme Dao Ancestors at most, so there is no need to send more.

Above!

The Fire King restrained the Void Dao Ancestor, and the Wind King snatched the Forbidden Mother Stone.

The battle is back on!

The battle at the Supreme Dao Ancestor level, no matter how weakened it was, was not something that Ye Tian could participate in.

These Supreme Dao Ancestors all possess forbidden bodies, master the power of dark taboos, and basically possess Supreme Dao Techniques, and their combat power is extremely terrifying.

Ye Tian fought with them, and the strongest attack couldn't hurt them in the slightest.

Unless Ye Tian could cultivate to the extreme of the Supreme True Ancestor, he would be able to reluctantly fight with these Supreme Dao Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Withdraw!

Ye Tian quickly withdrew from the battlefield, and the other True Ancestors had already retreated one by one, for fear of being killed by the battle fluctuations of the Supreme Dao Ancestors.

Although the Forbidden Mountain Range restrained the battle fluctuations, many supreme Dao Ancestors fought here, and the battle fluctuations affected the outside world, plus the War God True Kingdom had long been shattered by the battle of the True Ancestors.

As a result, the entire God of War True Kingdom instantly collapsed and shattered.

Rumble!!!!

Countless fragments were scattered in the void of the Xuan Void Ancient Realm, and those ordinary beings who remained inside the God of War True Kingdom died instantly, and there were not even corpses left.

The fight of the strongest Dao Ancestors caused many forbidden Dao stones to fly out and be snatched away by other Dao Ancestors and some True Ancestors.

The goal of the Supreme Dao Ancestors was the Forbidden Mother Stone, so they were not very interested in those scattered Forbidden Dao Stones.

Ye Tian also grabbed hundreds of more forbidden Dao stones, but it was much worse than the previous harvest.

But most of the Forbidden Dao Stones were still snatched away by the Supreme Dao Ancestors, and they were not stupid, it was impossible not to want those Forbidden Dao Stones, even if they fought for the Forbidden Mother Stones, it didn't take much time to collect the Forbidden Dao Stones.

After a while, the entire Forbidden Dao Stone vein completely shattered, most of the Forbidden Dao Stone was snatched away, and the Forbidden Mother Stone was completely exposed.

This forbidden mother stone is not small!

In an instant, all the Supreme Dao Ancestors were excited.

According to their preliminary speculation, this forbidden mother stone was enough for the three supreme Dao Ancestors to impact the invincible Dao Ancestor realm, and any force that obtained this forbidden mother stone could potentially cultivate three invincible Dao Ancestors!

Especially for the Eight Heavens Forces, getting this Forbidden Mother Stone means that their forces can become the Nine Heavens Forces, and who will be afraid of the three Nine Heavens Forces, the Heavenly Sea Sect, the Mitian Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple?

In other words, during the period of the Vast Sea Realm, the Nine Heavens forces crushed the Eight Heavens forces, and the Eight Heavens forces did not dare to confront the Nine Heavens forces at all, and they were usually cautious when they spoke.

But now, the major Eight Heaven Forces are not very afraid of the Nine Heavens at all, and the True Ancestors of the Eight Heavens Forces do not take the Nine Heavens Forces seriously.

Everyone speaks with strength, and they don't have to worry about anything.

Because no one knows what will happen in the future, it is too normal for the Eight Heavenly Forces to surpass the Nine Heavens Forces in the future.

If there were no rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, how could the Eight Heavenly Forces dare to snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone with the three Nine Heavenly Forces, but now they are all crazy, and they will snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone at all costs.

Even several of the Eight Heavenly Forces' supreme Dao Ancestors had cast forbidden techniques just to successfully snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone.

Abrupt.

The Heavenly Sea Sect's Divine Sea Dao Ancestor and Secret Immortal Dao Ancestor all cast forbidden techniques, using the strongest Dao Technique to block the attacks of other Supreme Dao Ancestors, while the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestors of the Tianhai Sect cast a forbidden light.

Tear and pull!

The Forbidden Mother Stone was cut off with a single blow, and it was separated from the Forbidden Dao Stone vein.

The one-person-high forbidden mother stone flew up, and the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestor was about to reach out and grab him.

"Yakumo Dao Ancestor, you dare!"

The other Supreme Dao Ancestors all opened their eyes angrily, very unwilling, they knew very well that once the Forbidden Mother Stone fell into the hands of the Eight Cloud Dao Ancestors, it would be more difficult to take it away.

But they didn't expect that the Tianhai Sect was willing to let the two Supreme Dao Ancestors cast the forbidden technique at the same time, and it was a forbidden technique at a huge cost, after this blow, these two Supreme Dao Ancestors were afraid that their foundation would be seriously damaged, and they would fall if they were not careful.

Of course, if you really succeed in taking away the Forbidden Mother Stone, then all the costs are worth it.

However.

The unexpected happened!

A slender little hand broke through the air, took a step ahead of Yayun Dao Ancestor, and took away the forbidden mother stone.

"Look for death!"

Yakumo Dao Ancestor was furious, and a blow pierced through the void, killing into the unknown depths.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

One by one, the strongest Dao Ancestors stopped and chased after the mysterious person who took away the forbidden mother stone.

In the blink of an eye, the Forbidden Mountain Range was no longer devoid of a Supreme Dao Ancestor.

At this time, many True Ancestors were discussing.

"Who was that? It looks like a woman's hand!"

"How do you know if a man is a woman or a woman? Dao ancestors are changeable, disguise it, who knows?"

"How do I feel that person is not a Dao Ancestor, but a True Ancestor?"

"True Ancestor, don't be kidding, General Jiuji is a supreme true ancestor, and he can't compete with the Supreme Dao Ancestor, which True Ancestor can snatch the Forbidden Mother Stone in front of the Supreme Dao Ancestor?"

No one believed that it was a true ancestor, but Ye Tian did.

"Is it Ouyang Jiu'er?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although that person's breath was fleeting, his breath did not look like Ouyang Jiu'er, but it was not difficult to change his breath, not to mention that Ouyang Jiu'er was a half-step domain ancestor in his previous life, so it was not difficult to change his breath.

And he was sure that that person was a supreme true ancestor, and his strength was definitely not weaker than him, but his strange methods surpassed him.

Supreme True Ancestor, the means are weird, isn't this normal Ouyang Jiu'er's operation?

If it was a normal Supreme True Ancestor, there was no hope of snatching things from the hands of the Supreme Dao Ancestor, but Ouyang Jiu'er, the reincarnation of the half-step domain ancestor, had the hope of doing so.

"I hope Ouyang Jiu'er can get rid of those supreme Dao Ancestors!"

Ye Tian secretly looked forward to it.
